title: Brighton Fringe Winter Showcase
description: The Brighton Fringe Showcase is making its return, to celebrate and give you a preview of some of the exciting acts that will be performing in Fringe 2026! We will also have a pop-up box office where you can speak to Brighton Fringe staff, purchase gift vouchers, and, after its success at the last showcase, the raffle will be making a triumphant return. So come on down and start the festive season with an evening of Brighton Fringe's most thrilling upcoming artists. Doors open 6.30 for a 7.30pm start, but feel free to come early and grab a drink from the beautiful Ironworks bar! Line up: ☆ Anna Free ☆ ☆ Brandy Bex ☆ ☆ Darryl J Carrington ☆ ☆ Kitty Cassis ☆ ☆ Paggy ☆ ☆ Paul Diello ☆ ☆ Sam Hickman ☆

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - Brighton June 2, 2022 Updated: June 23, 2023 No Comments 4
reviews.excerpt: Luke Rollason’s entertaining showcase of new talent shows us that the future of comedy is in very safe hands. The show starts on a slightly off-tone as Rollason (our host) opens with some clunky prop comedy. Rollason’s awkward and self-deprecating energy doesn’t seem the right choice to start, and gives the next act a tough job to warm the audience up.
